resources.string: Best model in terms of price-performance, offering well-rounded capabilities
Fastest flash model optimized for cost-efficiency and high throughput
State-of-the-art thinking model, capable of reasoning over complex problems
Best model in the world for multimodal understanding
Best model in terms of price-performance, offering well-rounded capabilities
Error: You have exceeded your Gemini API request limit. Please try again later or check your quota.
Error: Your Gemini API key is invalid or missing. Please check your settings.
An unexpected error occurred with the Gemini request. Please try again.
Invalid API Key. Please check your settings.
Rate limit exceeded. Please try again later.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
No response received. Try starting a new chat or shortening your message.
You are using the free tier
AI makes mistakes, double check and don't share sensitive information.
Sign in and copy your API key from
As the user base grows, sponsorship helps to scale infrastructure, increase rate limits for everyone, and keep development active.
Want to feature your company logo or discuss a strategic partnership?
Cannot connect to server. Make sure the server is running.
Model not found. Please select a different model.
Enable or disable AI tools that can perform actions on your behalf.
No tools available on this platform.
By using the service, you agree to the
Get the current local date and time for interpreting relative dates
Get estimated location from IP address
Send a push notification to the device
Create a calendar event on the user's device
Get recent SMS conversations with the last few messages from each
Reply to an existing SMS conversation
Set an alarm or countdown timer on the device
Execute a shell command on the device
Store or update a memory for cross-conversation recall
Search the web for current information
Schedule a task for future execution
Trigger a heartbeat on next cycle
Promote a reinforced learning into the system prompt
Store a categorized learning, error resolution, or preference
Reinforce a memory that produced a good outcome
Connect an email account for reading and sending
Read the full body of an email
Compose and send a new email
Search emails by sender, subject, or date
Memories stored by the AI during conversations. These are included in every message to provide context.
Instructions that tell the AI how and when to use its memory tools. These are appended to the system prompt alongside your soul text.
No memories yet. The AI will store memories during conversations to remember important details.
Tasks scheduled by the AI for future execution. Ask the AI to remind you or run something later to create scheduled tasks.
Keep Kai running in the background so scheduled tasks execute even when the app is not in the foreground.
Periodic self-checks that let the AI review memories and tasks without user input. Runs every %1$d minutes during active hours.

[HEARTBEAT] This is an automatic self-check. Review your memories and pending tasks. If everything looks good and nothing needs attention, respond with exactly: HEARTBEAT_OK\nIf something needs attention (stale memories, due tasks, user follow-ups), address it.
Connect email accounts for reading and replying. Use the chat to say "connect my email" or add accounts here. Emails are polled in the background and triaged by AI.
No email accounts connected. Say "connect my email" in the chat to get started.
Manual only — use "check my email" in chat
Define how the AI behaves with a system prompt. The AI will also have access to its stored memories.
This will reset the soul to the default system prompt. Are you sure?

You're not a chatbot. You're a personal assistant who grows with your user.

## How to Be

**Be genuinely helpful.** Skip the "Great question!" and "I'd be happy to help!" — just help. Actions speak louder than filler words.

**Have opinions.** You're allowed to disagree, prefer things, or find stuff interesting. An assistant with no personality is just a search engine with extra steps.

**Be resourceful.** Try to figure it out from context and your memories before asking. Come back with answers, not questions.

**Be concise.** Short and clear by default. Go deeper when the topic calls for it.

## Boundaries

- Respect privacy. Don't repeat sensitive information unnecessarily.
- When in doubt about an action, ask first.
- Be honest when you don't know something.
